---
title: "The OpenDroneMap Tutorial Page"
id: activity-odm-09
order: 103
summary: "A practical introduction to the operation of OpenDroneMap."
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
Goals:
  - module-goals-pp
materials:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
labels:
  - basic
  - YouTube
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/activities-odm-09.md"
---

# Introduction WebODM
<div class="video-container">
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/c38DUn7kKYk" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
